MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION BE ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 77052804) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMERO, DENIS , AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF DENIS ROMERO'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION BE ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN LARGE PART. ALL OF MR. ROMERO'S FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SANCHEZ IS REQUIRED TO PAY $860 IN REASONABLE MONETARY SANCTIONS TO MR. ROMERO NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 28, 2025. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN.COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COPURT'S RULING. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO, DENIS , AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, RAFAEL GARCIA , AN INDIVIDUAL $48,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,000.00, HOWEVER, EXECUTION ON THIS PORTION OF THIS JUDGMENT IS STAYED FOR TWO (2) YEARS FROM APRIL 29, 2026, EXCEPT THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO SHALL BE ALLOWED TO FILE AND/OR RECORD A PERSONAL PROPERTY LIEN WITH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE. PLEASE SEE DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS OF JUDGMENT.

DEFENDANT RAFAEL SANCHEZ IS REQUIRED TO SERVE VERIFIED CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO MR. ROMERO'S FIRST SETS OF FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT REQUESTS AND TO PAY $860 IN REASONABLE MONETARY SANCTIONS TO MR. ROMERO NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 28, 2025. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Dimensional Dental Management, LLC, a limited liability company.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:29 am and concluding at 9:31 am.

Plaintiff Denis Romero is present represented by Jethro Busch, Esq. Plaintiff is assisted by Spanish Language interpreter Jadie Suarez.
Defendant Rafael Garcia Sanchez is present in pro per. Defendant is assisted by Spanish language interpreter Manti Henriquez Cerification # 300781.

Defendant appearing, the matter is sent back to Department 206 for Trial.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Rafael Garcia Sanchez

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:11am and concluding at 10:18am.

Plaintiff Denis Romero is present with counsel Jethro Busch
Defendant Rafael Garcia Sanchez is not present.

Rafael Sanchez is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court finds good cause to continue this matter. The court is asking Mr. Busch to prepare and file a declaration regarding the attorney fees. The court is also asking Mr. Busch bring and evidence of the DBI notice of violations relating to this matter.

Any filings regarding the court's requests must be filed at least 5 days prior to the next hearing.

This matter is continued to April 1, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories, For Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - PLAINTIFF DENIS ROMERO's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories, For Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff Denis Romero's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and requests for production of documents is granted in large part. Defendant Rafael Sanchez is required to serve verified code-compliant responses without objections to Mr. Romero's first sets of form and special interrogatories and document requests and to pay $860 in reasonable monetary sanctions to Mr. Romero no later than November 28, 2025. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

Motion For Order Deeming Requests For Admission Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - PLAINTIFF DENIS ROMERO's Motion For Order Deeming Requests For Admission Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff Denis Romero's motion for order deeming requests for admissions admitted and for monetary sanctions is granted in large part. All of Mr. Romero's first set of requests for admission are deemed admitted. Defendant Rafael Sanchez is required to pay $860 in reasonable monetary sanctions to Mr. Romero no later than november 28, 2025. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Copurt's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
